response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR date : date
ATTR departure_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_registration : varchar : FK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR label : varchar

ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_code
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightPassenger
PK flight_code, passenger_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR seat : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrew
PK flight_code, crew_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK : FK

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK flight_code, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_time : time : PK

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_registration
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL FlightStatusLog -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL FlightPassenger -> Flight : N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightPassenger -> Passenger : N -> 1 : FK=passenger_code
REL FlightCrew -> Flight : N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightCrew -> CrewMember : N -> 1 : FK=crew_code
